name: a handful of some dark, fibrous material
identity: A mysterious substance with an earthy scent and medicinal undertones, examined by the elder and the player to determine its purpose as food, body paint, or ritual item.
current_status: Being examined by the elder and the player to determine its nature, with the elder's faint nod indicating partial approval of the captive's condition.

description.value: A handful of dark, fibrous material with an earthy scent and medicinal undertones, retrieved from a steaming wooden bowl.

properties.value: Earthy scent with medicinal undertones, coarse texture, and faintly pungent aroma

volatile_state.location: At the council fire, in the presence of the elder, the captive, and the player
volatile_state.current_activity: Being examined by the elder and the player to determine its nature and purpose
volatile_state.condition: Stable, with no visible changes from prior examination
